infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Macro Goal uses your health data to track your fitness progress and provide personalized nutrition recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Macro Goal writes workout and nutrition data to Apple Health to keep your health records up to date.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Macro Goal uses your location to find nearby gyms, restaurants, and food stores to help you reach your nutrition goals.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Macro Goal uses your health data to track your fitness progress and provide personalized nutrition recommendations.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Macro Goal writes workout and nutrition data to Apple Health to keep your health records up to date.
